{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Emperor’s silks
| introduced = ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Emperor]]'s silks are a type of cloth.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
